name: Wooden Food Truck
description: The creaking of wooden wheels means yummy food is on the way!

name: Bamboo Food Truck
description: The fragrance of bamboo and the mouthwatering aroma of the food combined in one.

name: Vintage Food Truck
description: How about some freshly baked bread made from homegrown wheat?

name: Ornate Food Truck
description: You can find all sorts of exquisite and delicious treats here!

name: World of Flavor
description: Let your taste buds soar alongside these wings.

name: Baker
description: Stomachs growl along as the boiling pumpkin soup bubbles away.

name: First Snow Food Truck
description: Don't miss out on the festive Christmas treats on the menu!

name: Tasty Mirage
description: Is this delicious flavor even real?

name: Leisurely Food Truck
description: You can smell the delicious food even from far away.

name: Coastline Food Truck
description: Would you like some sea salt soda?
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Fruity Food Truck
description: Wanna try a freshly baked fruit tart?

name: Whipped Cream Food Truck
description: What dessert I should make today?

name: Honey Bee Food Truck
description: The most delicious kitchen of the bee kingdom.

name: Cloudy Food Truck
description: Taste the flavors of the cosmos!

name: Wooden Vegetable Rack
description: Au natural flavors on display.

name: Handmade Vegetable Rack
description: A lovingly crafted rack made of fine wood.

name: Classy Vegetable Rack
description: Presents the most natural and authentic flavors to you.

name: Precious Vegetable Rack
description: Every harvest is precious.

name: Fancy Vegetable Rack
description: It automatically swats away an mosquitos that come close.

name: Playful Vegetable Rack
description: The vibrant colors give the ingredients a joyful touch!

name: Starlight Display Rack
description: This display rack keeps ingredients incredibly fresh!

name: Dotted Mushroom Vegetable Rack
description: These mushrooms cannot be eaten!

name: Carved Vegetable Rack
description: Made from precious wood and embellished with exquisite carvings. It's simply beautiful!

name: Humming Waves
description: So fresh even the denizens of the ocean want to buy some.
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Fruity Double Rack
description: Enjoy two different flavors at once!

name: Flatbread Vegetable Rack
description: Vegetable flavored flatbread sound very healthy!

name: Floral Vegetable Rack
description: All the vegetables here are freshly picked!

name: Interstellar Vegetable Rack
description: The vegetables on the rack are kept fresh by being in a vacuum.

name: Cheerful Houseplants
description: Adds a touch of elegance to the surroundings.

name: Green Fortune Tree
description: Brings good fortune, apparently.

name: Cooling Cactus
description: Stay calm and chill.

name: Exquisite Snacks
description: Grab a bite to take the edge off that hunger.

name: Blooming Flowers
description: Only the most dazzling moment will be displayed for your enjoyment.

name: Celebratory Rhythm
description: Wait a minute, is that something hiding among the balloons?

name: Snowfield Clock
description: Has a classic color scheme. It heralds the arrival of winter.

name: Lost Wonderland
description: It's covered in fine, delicate moss.

name: Banana Bonsai
description: It'd look even better with an ornamental rock.

name: Sailor
description: You must pick up this anchor to become a true sailor.
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Berry Record Player
description: Listen! Is that the sound of berries singing?!

name: Cotton Candy Potted Plant
description: I'm a little hesitant to tell you that this is only for decoration.

name: Midsummer Sunflower
description: Is this what summer feels like?

name: Galactic Flower
description: I picked the prettiest flower in the galaxy just for you.

name: Simple Order Box
description: What would you like today?

name: Metal Order Box
description: I'll leave the meal planning to you!

name: Tall Order Box
description: You won't believe what kind of orders you'll find inside!

name: Classic Order Box
description: How about some retro delicacies?

name: Swan Dedications
description: You can tell the swan anything.

name: Magic Boxes
description: With this magic wand, I can satisfy all your wants!

name: Chickadee Notebook
description: Let's see what orders have come in.

name: White Rabbit Order Box
description: Don't worry! White Rabbit will take everyone's orders properly!

name: Eight Treasure Delicacy
description: Please wait a moment. Your meal is on its way!

name: Sky Blue Letter
description: Hang on to a floaty if you can't swim!

name: Avocado Order Box
description: I Wonder where the other half of the avocado went.

name: Ice Cream Order Box
description: Wait! Your tongue will get stuck if you try to lick it.

name: Honey Dedications
description: Secretly whisper your thoughts to the bees!

name: Galactic Shuttle Box
description: Sometimes there are mystery orders.

name: Tree Stump Seat
description: Have a break and take it easy!

name: Bamboo Stool
description: Come take a seat on this sturdy stool.

name: Soft Cushioned Chair
description: A comfortable and value-for-money cushioned chair.

name: Relaxing Rocking Chair
description: People always ending up falling asleep in this chair without realizing it.

name: Creaky Antique Chair
description: You can tell how old it is from the way it creaks.

name: Guide to Napping
description: As resting is also part of work, come and take a quick nap!

name: Crispy Gingerbread Chair
description: Sit down and be greeted by the scent of gingerbread.

name: Time Lounge Chair
description: Will time rewind if you sit on it?

name: Antique Armchair
description: Relieves all your fatigue in an instant!

name: Beach Break
description: Remember to use sunscreen!
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Soft Cherry-Shaped Chair
description: Oof, what a close call. The chair is so comfortable that I almost didn't want to get up anymore.

name: Donut Stool
description: Oh! You'll gradually sink in while sitting on it.

name: Fluffy Cloud Stool
description: It feels very comfortable to sit among the clouds.

name: Interstellar Relaxation
description: Take a breather beneath a lovely rainbow.

name: Wattle Fence
description: The wooden stakes are firmly embedded in the ground.

name: Countryside Fence
description: Has a unique countryside vibe to it.

name: Artsy Fence
description: You brighten the place up more than anything else.

name: Cozy Fence
description: Makes you feel warm and fuzzy AND safe.

name: Pure White Fence
description: It feels quite romantic.

name: Carnival Party
description: The little ghost is currently helping set up the party.

name: Gingerbread Fence
description: The gingerbreads are all dressed up for winter to welcome everyone!

name: Rabbit Sonata
description: Did the rabbits' expressions change? Or... is it just my imagination?

name: Springtime
description: Let's go on a spring outing together!

name: Blue-white Braid
description: Uses a special coat of paint that resists corrosion from seawater.
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Fruity Fence
description: I can't believe what I'm seeing: There are gigantic fruits along the side of the field!

name: Cookie Fence
description: Don't worry! This fence is extremely sturdy. After all, I tried biting into it just now.

name: Cloth Fence
description: Has a clean and retro look.

name: Starlight Fence
description: Made from starlight.

name: Wooden Vegetable Rack
description: Stores the gifts of nature.

name: Homey Warehouse
description: A home for the seeds.

name: Nature Warehouse
description: Simulates the natural environment to better store seeds.

name: Budding Warehouse
description: Full of life inside.

name: Magic Seed Station
description: What are we planting today?

name: Carnival Tent
description: The seeds lie comfortably in the tent, no longer afraid of moisture.

name: Sugar Igloo
description: Do seeds have sweet dreams inside?

name: Eternal Teapot
description: Seeds placed inside are frozen in time, staying fresh indefinitely!

name: Springtime Granary
description: The seeds have just awakened from their winter slumber.

name: Leisurely Pinwheel
description: It creaks when the wind starts to blow.

name: Lemony Warehouse
description: Take a guess, where is the lemon's seed?

name: Jelly Warehouse
description: Not only does it look cute, but it can also effectively protect the seeds!

name: Cloudy Seed Station
description: The ideal temperaturę for storing seeds.

name: Space Plant Station
description: Researching newly discovered seeds.

name: Cobblestone Pathway
description: Feels cold to the touch.

name: Wooden Pathway
description: Makes a clacking sound each time you take a step.

description: Made from a special type of whitewood.

name: Multicolored Pathway
description: A perfect mix of colors.

name: Blooming Path
description: Take a walk among the flowers.

name: Candy Temptation
description: Huh? I wonder where the candy on the ground leads to.

name: Fondant Cookie
description: Its sweet scent draws you in before you know it.

name: Dreamland Forest
description: It seems to take you into another world...

name: Falling Blossom Tiles
description: One can't help but pause to admire these exquisite tiles.

name: Between the Tides
description: A gift from the ocean!

name: Fruity Cushions
description: They're made out of rubber. So soft anf squishy!

name: Honey Mat
description: I wonder who left these candy behind.

name: Hive Floor Tiles
description: Don't worry, there aren't any bees here.

name: Scattered Stardust
description: Scattered stardust sparkles quietly here.

name: Shabby Scarecrow
description: A cute doll made from random materials found nearby.

name: Countryside Scarecrow
description: A unsophisticated-looking scarecrow.

name: Harvest Scarecrow
description: May you be blessed with a bountiful harvest this year!

name: Exquisite Scarecrow
description: Shall we go on a picnic together?

name: Gentle Guardian
description: Hi, nice to meet you!

name: Playful Scarecrow
description: Actually, I can perform acrobatics as well!

name: Bus Stop Snowman
description: Always watching over you.

name: Down the Rabbit Hole
description: I shall be late! Are you ready to set off with me?

name: Tranquil Scarecrow
description: Want to harvest the fruits with me today?

name: Sailor Scarecrow
description: Yearining for the deep ocean...

name: Energetic Fruit Farmer
description: Good news! The fruits tha have been harvested this year are especially huge!

name: Teddy Bear
description: It's always protecting the field with a smile.

name: Lively Scarecrow
description: La, la, la! I'm the liveliest scarecrow!

name: Space Watcher
description: Do you often look up at the stars?
